所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.context,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.io,
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.utils

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.context.AnnotationConfigApplicationContext (implements org.xiaoyu.micro.context.ConfigurableApplicationContext)
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.context.ApplicationContextUtils
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.context.BeanDefinition (implements java.lang.Comparable<T>)
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.utils.ClassPathUtils
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.utils.ClassUtils
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.io.PropertyResolver
    • java.lang.Record
      • org.xiaoyu.micro.io.Resource
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.io.ResourceResolver
    • java.lang.Throwable (implements java.io.Serializable)
      • java.lang.Exception
        • java.lang.RuntimeException
          • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NestedRuntimeException
            • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeansException
              • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanCreationException
                • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.UnsatisfiedDependencyException
              • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanDefinitionException
                • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NoSuchBeanDefinitionException
                • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.NoUniqueBeanDefinitionException
              • org.xiaoyu.micro.exception.BeanNotOfRequiredTypeException
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.web.utils.YamlUtils

接口分层结构

  • java.lang.AutoCloseable
    • org.xiaoyu.micro.context.ApplicationContext
      • org.xiaoyu.micro.context.ConfigurableApplicationContext
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.context.BeanPostProcessor
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.io.InputStreamCallback<T>

Annotation Interface Hierarchy

  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Autowired (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Bean (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Component (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.ComponentScan (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Configuration (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Import (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Order (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Primary (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
  • org.xiaoyu.micro.annotation.Value (implements java.lang.annotation.Annotation)
